title: Deliciously Smoked Australian Chicken Skewers
description: A festive Australian dish featuring panang-paste and smoked to perfection with binchotan-charcoal, this recipe is perfect for a low-glycemic diet, the chicken skewers are marinated in a mixture of panang-paste, olive oil, and spices, then grilled to perfection
instructions: Preheat the binchotan-charcoal grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together panang-paste, olive oil, coconut milk, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Smoking the skewers with binchotan-charcoal adds a rich and savory flavor.
